expectations.evidence: File is at outputs/PM-001-shopify-adapter-startup-crash-local-profile.md with PM-001 prefix
Contains Summary, Timeline, Symptom, Root Cause, Fix Applied, Impact, Lessons Learned, and Prevention sections
Root cause mentions 'UnsatisfiedDependencyException' and 'required a bean of type org.springframework.web.client.RestClient that could not be found'
Both ExternalApiConfig and ShopifyPriceSyncAdapter are named in the Root Cause and Fix Applied sections

Explains that '@Profile("!local")' was added to ExternalApiConfig making beans unavailable, but ShopifyPriceSyncAdapter 'unconditionally required @Qualifier("shopifyRestClient") RestClient' and was not profile-gated
